name: Vegetable Biriyani
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Steamed Vegetables (e.g., green peas, beans, carrots, cauliflower)
2 tablespoons Cashew Nuts or Slivered Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the Basmati rice and soak it in water for 30 minutes. Drain well.
2. Melt 1 1/2 tablespoons butter in a skillet. Sauté onions until golden brown, then add raisins and cashew nuts. Set aside.
3. In another portion of melted butter, add the drained rice and stir to prevent sticking.
4. Mix in all spices (turmeric, cinnamon, clove, nutmeg, chilli, coriander).
5. Preheat oven to 375°F.
6. Transfer cooked rice into a baking dish. Add salt and 1 1/2 cups water.
7. Cook for 20 minutes or until the rice is done.
8. Mix in the steamed vegetables, onions, raisins, and cashew nuts.
